starter.audience: Individuals and early prototypes validating the CLI on real workflows.
starter.valueUnlock: Included monthly verifications at no cost; API key for the commercial CLI build.

team.audience: Small teams running verification in CI or staging with steady volume.
team.valueUnlock: Higher monthly included verifications and subscription billing via Stripe.

business.audience: Larger pipelines or multiple services needing headroom and predictable billing.
business.valueUnlock: Highest standard tier limits before enterprise negotiation.

enterprise.audience: Organizations needing custom limits, terms, or procurement.
